text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for stepping up to help keep things running smoothly.
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! So glad you joined us. Feel free to explore and don't hesitate to ask questions.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You're all set as an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions to our community events!
Welcome, mentor_lina! Thank you for volunteering as a mentor—your experience will be invaluable to our newer members.
